# Alloro

> Business clarity platform for licensed specialists. Every owner deserves the life they set out to build.

## What is Alloro?

Alloro is a business intelligence platform built for licensed specialists (endodontists, orthodontists, chiropractors, physical therapists, optometrists, veterinarians, attorneys, CPAs, financial advisors). It provides competitive market intelligence, referral network analysis, and practice performance tracking.

## Core Product

- Free Referral Base Checkup: 30-second competitive analysis showing where a practice ranks in its local market
- Monday Intelligence Brief: weekly email with actionable findings about ranking changes, competitor moves, and referral network health
- Practice Dashboard: real-time competitive positioning, review velocity, referral drift alerts
- PatientPath/ClearPath: practice websites built from verified business data
